templates.name: Military discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://www.chubbiesshorts.com/pages/chubbies-military-verification

templates.name: Bundle Offer Upsell
templates.content: You can take advantage of our bundle offer where you can get 2 full priced items from swim, casual, sport lounge, or collared shirt categories and get $10 off.

templates.name: Difference between the "Khakinators" Original Stretch, Everywear Stretch & Flat Front Stretch?
templates.content: The Original Stretch comes with an elastic waist, the Everywear Stretch is waterproof and the Flat Front Stretch offers multiple inseams.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via DHL, UPS, or USPS. You'll see an estimated delivery date at checkout. Please keep in mind that the date is just an estimation and may change during transit.

templates.name: Store locator
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.chubbiesshorts.com/pages/stores

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at support@chubbies.com Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://www.chubbiesshorts.com/pages/help?a=Does-Chubbies-have-a-warranty-program---id--1LJC0lSETqyyC84K_1rQEw

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! Would you mind sharing your usual size? You can also check out our size charts here: https://www.chubbiesshorts.com/pages/size-guides

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Due to our current shipping procedures, at this time we are unable to process order changes or address changes once an order has been submitted.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $35. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Where are your products made / manufactured?
templates.content: All our products are designed by our team in Austin, TX, and manufactured internationally in Vietnam, China, and India.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at support@chubbies.com Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://instagram.com/chubbies/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/chubbies

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@chubbies.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Do you offer custom orders?
templates.content: Yes, we're very excited to offer custom embroidery on any orders of 20 or more. Please fill out this form to get started: https://forms.gle/BR7jLYJcWcEScTpD8 Once you've complete the form, please email us at support@chubbies.com so we can follow it up with our team.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: I am truly sorry but we don't offer phone support currently. You can text us at (512) 357-7845 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Rewards / referral program
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.chubbiesshorts.com/pages/rewards

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: No problem! You can find our detailed return/exchange instructions here : https://exchanges.chubbiesshorts.com/#/

templates.name: How to return an item with exchange credit
templates.content: No problem, just head to exchanges.chubbiesshorts.com to get that started. You'll want to select 'return' instead of exchange, go through the prompts, then choose the 'shop with credit' option. This will take you to the site to choose your new item with your exchange credit!
